idea-plugin.name: Clauditor
idea-plugin.description:
Clauditor brings Claude Code session management directly into your JetBrains IDE.

Session Management

  • Browse, search, resume, fork, and delete sessions from a dedicated tool window
  • Sessions open as editor tabs with embedded terminals — arrange them alongside source files
  • Open sessions persist across IDE restarts
  • Purge old sessions in bulk by age

External Session Detection

  • Detects Claude sessions running in external terminals (iTerm, VS Code, etc.)
  • External sessions shown with distinct icon and grayed out in the session list
  • Tabs for externally-open sessions show an info panel with auto-resume when the external session closes

Git Worktree Support

  • Create isolated Claude sessions in git worktrees with their own branches
  • Worktree toolbar with commit, PR, rebase, and merge controls

Transient Popup Queries

  • Summarize — one-click conversation summary via a transient forked session, displayed in a popup
  • Explain Changes — explains uncommitted session changes using conversation context and git diff
  • Review Memory — analyzes auto-memory files and suggests promotions to rules
  • Results rendered as formatted HTML with markdown support (tables, code blocks, lists)
  • Cached per query type, invalidated when the session advances

Live Status & Context

  • Tab indicators: thinking, idle, waiting for permission, compacting, unresponsive (⊘)
  • Automatic detection of frozen/unresponsive CLI sessions with reconnect prompt
  • Context usage progress bar and model info per session
  • Rate limit tracking and auth status in the Status panel
  • CLI version in status bar links to release notes
  • Browse and insert rules, agents, skills, and memory files from the Context panel

Editor Integration

  • Drag and drop files onto session tabs to insert their paths
  • Git toolbar with branch, change count, and session-aware diffing
  • Message history sidebar for navigating conversations
  • Model and effort switching from the session toolbar

Settings Panel

  • Configure under Settings > Tools > Clauditor
  • Transient query model (haiku/sonnet/opus), unresponsive timeout, claude binary path, default session args
  • Environment variable toggles: COLORTERM=truecolor, telemetry, update check, prompt caching
  • Custom environment variables (KEY=VALUE) with link to Claude Code env var docs

Requires Claude Code CLI installed and available on your PATH.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0 — Initial release

  • Session browser with search and sort
  • Session transcript viewer
  • One-click resume in terminal
  • Live status monitoring
  • Context file inspector
